plugins.name: paywhere-smb
plugins.description: Small-business finance workflows (cash-flow forecasting, month-end close, payroll planning, AP batch bill-pay, hours billing + contractor payouts, invoice chasing, commission payouts across ACH/Wire/Stablecoin) running against Paywhere + QuickBooks, with a single repeatable /demo-setup command.

plugins.name: paywhere-eng-workflow
plugins.description: Shared Paywhere engineering workflow: Linear-ticket-driven branch/PR flow, dependency refresh, TeamCity reconcile, production cuts. Parameterised per-repo via .claude/eng-workflow.json.
